## Team — primary contacts

(stored in legal / procurement system; this file references roles only)

- **Account director (primary contact)** — manages engagement day-to-day
- **Creative director** — owns creative output
- **Strategist** — owns creative brief interpretation
- **Account manager (backup)** — covers when primary is OOO

## Performance scorecard (current quarter)

```yaml
period: Q2-2026
on_spec_rate: 0.94
on_time_rate: 0.93
median_round_1_iterations: 2
dispute_count: 0
client_satisfaction: 4.4 / 5
recommended_action: continue
```

## Strengths observed (across engagements)

- Strong brand-territory exploration; rarely needs more than 2 rounds at the directional level
- Good at restraint — produces work that respects the brand-voice "institutional patience" mandate (sovereign-affiliated register, no hype)
- Account director is responsive (median <4h on workday queries)

## Friction points observed

- Scope-creep tendency on social cutdowns and adaptations — over-deliver instinct creates change-order pressure. Proactive scope discipline helps.
- Slower on AR-language localization handoffs — coordinate with `localization` agent more aggressively in round 1, not round 2.
- Creative director's calendar can be a bottleneck for the second-round review cycle. Plan around it.

## Renewal status

- MAS renewal due: 2027-12-31
- Recommended action at renewal: re-tender (developer's procurement policy requires re-tender for agency MASes >2 years old)
- Anticipated re-tender start: 2027-06-30 to allow 6-month process

- Designs in progress: Canva (per `integrations/canva/spec.md`) — agency-team has shared workspace

- Shared planning: Miro (per `integrations/miro/spec.md`)
- Communications: structured feedback through `agency-liaison` agent; informal via Slack channel #aldar-q3-memac
